$description: Alright motion tokens v0.1 — duration, easing, distance. Codifica o sistema de motion da marca, ancorado na Big idea ((Look again.)). Cravado em 2026-05-10. Owner: brand visual core. Documentação: /03-color-aihouse-motion/motion/01-motion-principles.md

instant.$description: Microinteração de feedback (button press, focus ring appear). UI tier.

fast.$description: Hover state, color shift, tooltip, focus ring transition. UI tier.

normal.$description: Modal open, dropdown, panel slide, page fade default. UI tier.

slow.$description: Section transitions, scroll-triggered card reveal. Bridge entre UI e editorial.

cinematic.$description: Logo reveal, hero zoom, page transition editorial, scroll-into-view hero. Editorial tier.

editorial.$description: Look again moments, brand canon reveals, manifest opening, image reveal close-to-wide. Editorial tier máximo.

standard.$description: Default UI, transições neutras, color shift. Equivalente Material 3 Standard.

decelerate.$description: Entradas (slide in, fade in), elementos chegando. Material 3 Decelerated.

accelerate.$description: Saídas (slide out, fade out, modal close). Material 3 Accelerated.

emphasized.$description: Reveals editoriais com peso, hero into view. Material 3 Emphasized Decelerate.

cinematic.$description: Look again moments — equivalente easeOutExpo (Penner). 95% da distância nos primeiros 50% do tempo, slow-out final que respira. A curva mais usada em opening de feature filme contemporâneo. Sem overshoot.

subtle.$description: Hover lift de botão, focus ring nudge, translate Y de wordmark em entry.

normal.$description: Slide in de dropdown, panel, tooltip, page transition default.

dramatic.$description: Slide in de modal, hero scroll reveal, page transition editorial. Limite máximo em UI.

entryTotal.$description: Logo entry animation completa (peça canônica). Sequência wordmark → parênteses → accent opcional.

dualStateTransition.$description: Default C.2 → Expressivo C.1 transition. Reverse usa motion.duration.normal (400ms).

revealAIright.$description: Reveal Alright → ((A I r i g h t)) — ato editorial máximo, uso restrito 1× por documento.

devicePulseCycle.$description: Brand device (( )) pulse animation cycle (loading states). Scale 100% → 102% → 100%.

deviceOpening.$description: Brand device (( )) opening animation — abre como brackets convergindo.

slateOpeningTotal.$description: Logo opening completo em vídeo (bone hold + (( )) opening + wordmark + hold + fade). Para opening de filme institucional.

slateClosingTotal.$description: Logo closing completo em vídeo (fade-from-bone + ((Alright)) reveal + hold + fade out). End-frame canon.

lowerThirdEntry.$description: Lower-third slide in da esquerda + fade. Easing emphasized.

lowerThirdHold.$description: Tempo on-screen mínimo de lower-third (rule of three — ler 3× rápido).

slateCardEntry.$description: Slate card entre cenas: fade in + scale 0.98 → 1.0, easing cinematic.

slateCardHoldMedium.$description: Slate card hold para frase curta.

slateCardExit.$description: Slate card fade out, easing accelerate.

fallbackDuration.$description: Duration usada para substituir reveals editoriais (cinematic/editorial) quando prefers-reduced-motion: reduce ativo.

fallbackEasing.$description: Easing padrão usado em modo reduced motion — substitui cinematic/emphasized por standard conservador.

frameRates.web: 60fps default; 30fps fallback aceitável para vídeo embedded

antiPatterns: Springs SaaS bouncy (Material You bouncy springs, Framer Motion type:spring defaults com damping<10)
Auto-play de áudio em qualquer contexto
Cuts nervosos onde reveal é possível
principles: Look again moments — cada peça canônica tem ao menos 1 reveal lento (≥1.4s)
Reveal over cut — preferência declarada por reveals sobre cortes nervosos
Easing humano — curvas derivam de física natural (slow-out), zero overshoot
Tempo cinematográfico — duration medida em segundos para editorial, ms para UI
Reduced motion como default friendly — simplifica, não desliga

references.materialDesign3: Standard, decelerate, accelerate, emphasized easings derivam de Material Design 3 motion specs
references.easeOutExpo: motion.easing.cinematic equivale a easeOutExpo (Robert Penner, 2001) — curva canônica de opening cinematográfico
references.wcag22: Sistema respeita WCAG 2.2 SC 2.3.3 (Animation from Interactions) e SC 2.2.2 (Pause, Stop, Hide)
references.prefersReducedMotion: Implementação via CSS @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) e Framer Motion <MotionConfig reducedMotion='user'>
